title: Missing Ten Days
writer: James Curtis, Bruce Graeme, John Meehan Jr.
actors: Rex Harrison, Kaaren Verne, C.V. France
plot: Bob Stevens (Sir Rex Harrison) awakens in a hospital with a gunshot wound to his head, and is told that he has been in Paris for ten days. However, this cannot be true because he insists that he crashed his plane and has no recoll...
